assessor_1_raw: Hierarchical transformer vs TF-IDF for rare ICD-10 codes. Rare-code stratum defined by training-set frequencies (correct). Section detector applied identically across models (correct). Threshold tuning on validation only (correct). Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: ClinicalBERT pre-trained vocabulary is fixed - no vocabulary leakage. Section-type embeddings learned on training only. Patient-level leakage at split boundaries is prevented by assigning all admissions to the earlier partition. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Multi-label evaluation with per-label threshold tuning on validation is rigorous. Platt scaling calibration on validation set is correct. Hospital as random effect for robustness checks is appropriate. Verdict: defense_wins.
